revision.text: {{[[Wikipedia:Substitution|subst]]:[[Template:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}]]{{#ifeq:{{{2|+}}}|{{{2|-}}}||{{{2}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{3|+}}}|{{{3|-}}}||{{{3}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{4|+}}}|{{{4|-}}}||{{{4}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{5|+}}}|{{{5|-}}}||{{{5}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{6|+}}}|{{{6|-}}}||{{{6}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{7|+}}}|{{{7|-}}}||{{{7}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{8|+}}}|{{{8|-}}}||{{{8}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{9|+}}}|{{{9|-}}}||{{{9}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{10|+}}}|{{{10|-}}}||{{{10}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{11|+}}}|{{{11|-}}}||..}}}} {{documentation|content= {{FromMeta|Template:Tlxs}} ==Purpose== This creates a template link to templatespace for templates which require substitution, and indicates such, for use in documentation pages. ==Syntax== {{((}}tlxs{{!}} templatename {{))}} ==Example== {{tlx|tlxs|tlxs}} produces {{tlxs|tlxs}} ==See also== * {{tl|tlx}} -- the non-substitution version }} [[Category:Internal link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

{{[[Wikipedia:Substitution|subst]]:[[Template:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}]]{{#ifeq:{{{2|+}}}|{{{2|-}}}||{{{2}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{3|+}}}|{{{3|-}}}||{{{3}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{4|+}}}|{{{4|-}}}||{{{4}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{5|+}}}|{{{5|-}}}||{{{5}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{6|+}}}|{{{6|-}}}||{{{6}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{7|+}}}|{{{7|-}}}||{{{7}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{8|+}}}|{{{8|-}}}||{{{8}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{9|+}}}|{{{9|-}}}||{{{9}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{10|+}}}|{{{10|-}}}||{{{10}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{11|+}}}|{{{11|-}}}||..}}}} {{documentation|content= {{FromMeta|Template:Tlxs}} ==Purpose== This creates a template link to templatespace for templates which require substitution, and indicates such, for use in documentation pages. ==Syntax== {{((}}tlxs{{!}} templatename {{))}} ==Example== {{tlx|tlxs|tlxs}} produces {{tlxs|tlxs}} ==See also== * {{tl|tlx}} -- the non-substitution version }} [[Category:Internal link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

revision.comment: but the tfm-inline notice should be visible to all transclusions of the template
revision.text: {{tfm|Tlxs}}{{Tfm-inline|Tlxs|tiny=yes}}{{[[Wikipedia:Substitution|subst]]:[[Template:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}]]{{#ifeq:{{{2|+}}}|{{{2|-}}}||{{{2}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{3|+}}}|{{{3|-}}}||{{{3}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{4|+}}}|{{{4|-}}}||{{{4}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{5|+}}}|{{{5|-}}}||{{{5}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{6|+}}}|{{{6|-}}}||{{{6}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{7|+}}}|{{{7|-}}}||{{{7}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{8|+}}}|{{{8|-}}}||{{{8}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{9|+}}}|{{{9|-}}}||{{{9}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{10|+}}}|{{{10|-}}}||{{{10}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{11|+}}}|{{{11|-}}}||..}}}} {{documentation|content= {{FromMeta|Template:Tlxs}} ==Purpose== This creates a template link to templatespace for templates which require substitution, and indicates such, for use in documentation pages. ==Syntax== {{((}}tlxs{{!}} templatename {{))}} ==Example== {{tlx|tlxs|tlxs}} produces {{tlxs|tlxs}} ==See also== * {{tl|tlx}} -- the non-substitution version * {{tl|tls}} -- the non-parameter version of this template }} [[Category:Internal link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

{{tfm|Tlxs|Tlsx}}{{Tfm-inline|Tlxs|tiny=yes}}{{[[Wikipedia:Substitution|subst]]:[[Template:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}]]{{#ifeq:{{{2|+}}}|{{{2|-}}}||{{{2}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{3|+}}}|{{{3|-}}}||{{{3}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{4|+}}}|{{{4|-}}}||{{{4}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{5|+}}}|{{{5|-}}}||{{{5}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{6|+}}}|{{{6|-}}}||{{{6}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{7|+}}}|{{{7|-}}}||{{{7}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{8|+}}}|{{{8|-}}}||{{{8}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{9|+}}}|{{{9|-}}}||{{{9}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{10|+}}}|{{{10|-}}}||{{{10}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{11|+}}}|{{{11|-}}}||..}}}} {{documentation|content= {{FromMeta|Template:Tlxs}} ==Purpose== This creates a template link to templatespace for templates which require substitution, and indicates such, for use in documentation pages. ==Syntax== {{((}}tlxs{{!}} templatename {{))}} ==Example== {{tlx|tlxs|tlxs}} produces {{tlxs|tlxs}} ==See also== * {{tl|tlx}} -- the non-substitution version * {{tl|tls}} -- the non-parameter version of this template }} [[Category:Internal link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

{{tfm|Tlxs|Tlsx}}{{Tfm-inline|Tlxs|tiny=yes}}{{[[Wikipedia:Substitution|subst]]:[[Template:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}]]{{#ifeq:{{{2|+}}}|{{{2|-}}}||{{{2}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{3|+}}}|{{{3|-}}}||{{{3}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{4|+}}}|{{{4|-}}}||{{{4}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{5|+}}}|{{{5|-}}}||{{{5}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{6|+}}}|{{{6|-}}}||{{{6}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{7|+}}}|{{{7|-}}}||{{{7}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{8|+}}}|{{{8|-}}}||{{{8}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{9|+}}}|{{{9|-}}}||{{{9}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{10|+}}}|{{{10|-}}}||{{{10}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{11|+}}}|{{{11|-}}}||..}}}} {{Documentation|content= {{FromMeta|Template:Tlxs}} ==Purpose== This creates a template link to templatespace for templates which require substitution, and indicates such, for use in documentation pages. ==Syntax== {{((}}tlxs{{!}} templatename {{))}} ==Example== {{tlx|tlxs|tlxs}} produces {{tlxs|tlxs}} ==See also== {{Tl-nav}} }} [[Category:Internal link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

revision.comment: merging some code from [[Template:Tlsx]] into this one
revision.text: {{tfm|Tlxs|Tlsx}}{{Tfm-inline|Tlxs|tiny=yes}}{{[[Wikipedia:Substitution|subst]]:[[Template:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|{{#ifeq:{{lcfirst:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}|{{lc:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}|{{lcfirst:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}|{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}]]{{#ifeq:{{{2|+}}}|{{{2|-}}}||{{{2}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{3|+}}}|{{{3|-}}}||{{{3}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{4|+}}}|{{{4|-}}}||{{{4}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{5|+}}}|{{{5|-}}}||{{{5}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{6|+}}}|{{{6|-}}}||{{{6}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{7|+}}}|{{{7|-}}}||{{{7}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{8|+}}}|{{{8|-}}}||{{{8}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{9|+}}}|{{{9|-}}}||{{{9}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{10|+}}}|{{{10|-}}}||{{{10}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{11|+}}}|{{{11|-}}}||...}}}} {{Documentation|content= {{FromMeta|Template:Tlxs}} ==Purpose== This creates a template link to templatespace for templates which require substitution, and indicates such, for use in documentation pages. ==Syntax== {{((}}tlxs{{!}} templatename {{))}} ==Example== {{tlx|tlxs|tlxs}} produces {{tlxs|tlxs}} ==See also== {{Tl-nav}} }} [[Category:Internal link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

{{tfm|Tlxs|Tlsx}}{{Tfm-inline|Tlxs|tiny=yes}}{{{{#ifeq:{{{link subst|yes}}}|yes |[[Wikipedia:Substitution|subst]] |subst }}:[[Template:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|{{#ifeq:{{lcfirst:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}|{{lc:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}|{{lcfirst:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}|{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}]]{{#ifeq:{{{2|+}}}|{{{2|-}}}||{{{2}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{3|+}}}|{{{3|-}}}||{{{3}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{4|+}}}|{{{4|-}}}||{{{4}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{5|+}}}|{{{5|-}}}||{{{5}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{6|+}}}|{{{6|-}}}||{{{6}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{7|+}}}|{{{7|-}}}||{{{7}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{8|+}}}|{{{8|-}}}||{{{8}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{9|+}}}|{{{9|-}}}||{{{9}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{10|+}}}|{{{10|-}}}||{{{10}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{11|+}}}|{{{11|-}}}||...}}}} {{Documentation|content= {{FromMeta|Template:Tlxs}} ==Purpose== This creates a template link to templatespace for templates which require substitution, and indicates such, for use in documentation pages. ==Syntax== {{((}}tlxs{{!}} templatename {{))}} ==Example== {{tlx|tlxs|tlxs}} produces {{tlxs|tlxs}} ==See also== {{Tl-nav}} }} [[Category:Internal link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

revision.comment: Move documentation from template to subpage
Protected Template:Tlxs: [[WP:High-risk templates|Highly visible template]]: will be highly transcluded after merge with [[Template:Tlsx]] ([edit=sysop] (indefinite) [move=sysop] (indefinite))
Changed protection level of Template:Tlxs: per user request at RFPP ([Edit=Allow only template editors and admins] (indefinite) [Move=Allow only template editors and admins] (indefinite))
support same bolding option at [[Template:Tlg]], etc. Sandboxed and tested.
Primefac moved page [[Template:Tlxs]] to [[Template:Template link expanded with subst]]: make the name more obvious
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
1 revision imported: reimporting these to fix older errors
Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24984760715|time triggered pipeline]]
